typography.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-light text-[#F5F5F5] leading-tight

components.navbar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/5 flex justify-between items-center px-6 py-4 transition-all duration-300
components.product_card: relative group bg-[#141414] border border-white/5 rounded-none overflow-hidden hover:border-[#C9A961]/30 transition-all duration-500
components.button_primary: bg-[#C9A961] text-[#0A0A0A] px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-xs font-semibold hover:bg-[#F5F5F5] transition-colors duration-300 data-testid='btn-primary'
components.button_secondary: border border-white/20 text-[#F5F5F5] px-8 py-4 uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-xs font-semibold hover:border-[#C9A961] hover:text-[#C9A961] transition-colors duration-300 data-testid='btn-secondary'
components.input_field: w-full bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 text-[#F5F5F5] py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#C9A961] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none placeholder:text-white/30

motion_and_interactions.scroll_engine: Lenis (momentum scrolling is mandatory for premium feel)
motion_and_interactions.hero_animation: Use Framer Motion to simulate 3D depth. The background kitchen image scales down slightly, while the overlaying sink product image floats (y-axis sine wave) and scales up slightly on scroll.
motion_and_interactions.scroll_reveal: initial: { opacity: 0, y: 40 }, whileInView: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, transition: { duration: 0.8, ease: [0.16, 1, 0.3, 1] }
motion_and_interactions.hover_state: Image scale 1.05 + subtle glow shadow-lg shadow-[#C9A961]/10. Text elements slightly shift x-axis.

Home.Hero: Full-screen luxury environment. Background: `lifestyle_kitchen_1` with dark overlay (`bg-black/50`). Foreground: `hero_product` floating in center. Title: 'The Pinnacle of Culinary Architecture' in Cormorant Garamond. Scroll triggers the sink to slightly rotate (using Framer Motion rotateZ) and separate into layers.
Home.The_Art_of_Quartz: Cinematic text-heavy section with `water_ripple_texture` as a dark parallax background. Highlighting scratch, stain, and heat resistance using minimalistic iconography and elegant typography.
Home.Product_Collection: Bento grid of the Metallic Series (`product_metallic_drain`) and Marble combinations (`product_black_double`). Hovering over cards triggers a premium glass reflection effect.
Home.Craftsmanship: Side-by-side parallax scroll showing detailed zoomed-in textures (`product_top_angle`) on one side, and scrolling technical specs on the other.

Contact.Form: Minimalist inquiry form using only bottom borders for inputs, centered in a sophisticated dark grey (`#141414`) container with a subtle gold accent.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Dark Luxury theme. Use the exact hex codes provided for backgrounds (#0A0A0A, #141414) and accents (#C9A961).
Do NOT use Inter, Space Grotesk, or Roboto. Import 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts into the index.css or layout.
ALL interactive elements (buttons, nav links, form inputs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
Simulate the 'floating 3D quartz sink' using Framer Motion (2.5D parallax). Apply subtle y-axis floating and scroll-based rotation to 'hero_product' over 'lifestyle_kitchen_1'.
Implement Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling. It is essential for the premium cinematic feel.
Avoid standard Shadcn cards; use flat raw HTML/Tailwind divs with subtle `border-white/5` for a high-end editorial feel.
Ensure textual contrast is maintained by using text shadows or gradient overlays (`bg-black/50`) behind text placed on images.
Do NOT create any TS/TSX files. All code must be plain JS (.js/.jsx) as per the environment constraints.
